overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA V) showing a character walking along a waterfront promenade next to a large mossy concrete structure, then entering the water and approaching a large white luxury yacht anchored near the shore. The scene features clear blue skies, calm water, and bare deciduous trees suggesting late autumn or winter.

events.description: passing the mossy concrete wall into open waterfront area with clear view of the harbor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the paved path next to a large moss-covered concrete structure, heading toward a white yacht visible in the harbor

entered.detail: large vertical concrete wall covered in green moss and rust stains
red brick paved walkway along the water's edge
large white multi-deck yacht anchored in the calm water with blue tinted windows
white rectangular information boards with maps or displays
leafless trees indicating autumn or winter season
tall brown reeds growing along the waterline

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person perspective walking along a waterfront promenade. A large moss-covered concrete structure dominates the right side initially before the view opens up to the harbor. A white luxury yacht is visible in the distance across calm water, while bare trees and information boards line the right side of the brick path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor water approaching anchored yacht

events.description: character steps off the paved path and enters the water, transitioning from land to water locomotion
brief first-person view looking down at character's legs and white sneakers entering the water

agents.ego_description: moving through the water toward the luxury yacht, transitioning from walking to swimming with a brief submersion showing legs entering the water

segments.scene_description: The character enters the water and swims toward the large white yacht anchored in the harbor. The camera briefly shows a first-person view of legs stepping into the water before surfacing. The yacht grows progressively larger as the camera approaches its stern and swim platform, with the shoreline structures now left behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a structured waterfront promenade into the open harbor toward a distant luxury vessel. It begins by walking along a brick path lined with bare trees and information boards, with a massive moss-covered concrete structure dominating the right side before the view opens up to the water. As the camera reaches the edge of the promenade, the perspective shifts downward to show legs stepping into the calm sea before surfacing to swim. The scene then transitions from the shoreline to the open harbor, with the distant white yacht growing progressively larger as the camera approaches its stern and swim platform.
